title: ACER: tighten T50 tape34 1e-5 -> 1e-9 (acecpe FP grind)
description: 60 sub-1e-5 lines remain in T50 tape34: FP in per-mu Coulomb eval, trapezoidal cumm accumulation order, log-log interp on yys. Fortran acecpe (acefc.f90 ~6492-6671): write(*,...) sigc/signi/cumm/signow, match Julia order. Files: src/formats/ace_charged.jl, ace_builder.jl.
acceptance_criteria: T50 tape34 163/163 bit-identical @1e-9; no regression on T01 ACE.

title: ACER promotion: T50 @1e-9 + 8 sibling tests
description: Promote acer_module to a real ACE generator. T50 at NUMERIC_PASS 1e-5 (143/163 bit-identical). Unlocks T14,T48,T51-54,T62,T71. HANDOFF P1 ACER; worklog/T50_acer_phase1_scaffolding.md.

title: broadr: optimize hot loop (prealloc/devectorize), target <300s
description: Devectorize/preallocate the broadr hot loop per profiling. Preserve exact FP semantics (no numeric regression). Files: src/processing/broadr.jl, sigma1.jl.
acceptance_criteria: T15 broadr completes <300s, tapes 22/23 produced, broadened XS bit-identical to pre-optimization output.

title: broadr: profile sigma1 Doppler hot loop (U-238 URR)
description: @profile / flamegraph broadn_grid + sigma1_at on the U-238 (T15) case. Identify the hot loop. No code change -- diagnosis only. Files: src/processing/broadr.jl, src/processing/sigma1.jl.
acceptance_criteria: Flamegraph captured; named hotspot(s) identified with line numbers.

title: broadr U-238 JENDL performance (T15/T17 TIMEOUT)
description: T15/T17 full-pipeline timeout in broadr (~1039s vs Fortran ~30s) over U-238 dense URR tabulation. Blocks end-to-end validation of all Phase 71-76 T15 covcal/rescon work. HANDOFF P2 broadr perf (retired bead NJOY.jl-326). Files: src/processing/broadr.jl, sigma1.jl.

title: leapr contin Phase B: naint SCT-gating (T80 toward bit-identical)
description: Fortran contin (leapr.f90:584-642) wraps ssm(k,j)=ssct inside iprt=mod(j-1,naint)+1==1 -- only every naint-th alpha (+ j=nalpha) gets SCT replacement; Julia replaces all unconditionally. Thread LeaprParams.naint into generate_sab. Files: src/processing/leapr.jl, src/orchestration/modules/leapr.jl. HANDOFF P2 leapr Phase B; worklog/T80_leapr_contin_phase_a_lat_sc.md.
acceptance_criteria: T80 tape24 closer to 91453/91453 @1e-9; T22 stays BIT_IDENTICAL 4636/4636.

title: P0: Re-run full 84-test reference sweep (post-Phase-76 baseline)
description: REFERENCE_SWEEP.md is stale (Phase 67, 2026-05-03), predates Phases 68-76. Re-run test/validation/sweep_reference_tests.jl for the true current baseline. Nuke precomp cache first. ~90 min, background. Cannot run concurrently with any other Julia (Rule 9).
acceptance_criteria: reports/REFERENCE_SWEEP.md regenerated reflecting post-Phase-76 state; crash count and DIFFS baseline current.

title: errorr: T15 covcal sub-section content fidelity (geometry done Phase 75)
description: Line geometry exact (tape26 5958=5958). Remaining: per-MT sub-section VALUE fidelity vs ref. Full-pipeline validation gated by broadr perf. HANDOFF P1 covcal.
acceptance_criteria: T15 tape26 NUMERIC_PASS @1e-5 once broadr unblocks end-to-end run.

title: groupr: derive MT=251/252 + skip empty-MT (T15 tape91 MF3 -> 40 MTs)
description: (1) U-238 MT=37 emits all-zero groups (threshold above LANL-30 top); Fortran nextr skips. (2) MT=251 mubar / MT=252 xi derived from MF4/6 angular dists (gendir/convr). Files: src/orchestration/modules/groupr.jl. Fortran groupr.f90 nextr 1087-1123. HANDOFF P2; worklog/T15_groupr_auto_expand.md.
acceptance_criteria: T15 tape91 MF3 MT count exactly 40; no all-zero groups; MT=251/252 within 1e-7 of ref.

title: thermr: read MF7/MT2 Bragg lattice from ENDF (remove hardcoded table)
description: Replace hardcoded BRAGG_LATTICE_PARAMS with per-material MF7/MT2 reads. Unblocks T25,T67-70,T74 (6-7 thermal tests on stubs). Fortran thermr.f90 bragg. Files: src/processing/thermr.jl, src/orchestration/auto_params.jl.
acceptance_criteria: BRAGG_LATTICE_PARAMS removed; T25,T67,T68,T69,T70,T74 use real MF7/MT2 reads.

title: ACER: verify T14, T48 ACE output
description: T14, T48 RAN_OK without oracle comparison today. Generate oracle, compare ACE tape34.
acceptance_criteria: T14 and T48 ACE tapes reach NUMERIC_PASS.

title: ACER: sibling tests T51-54, T62, T71 (NSUB letter maps + new MTs)
description: Verify NSUB->letter mappings (proton/deuteron/triton+H-2 etc) and exercise new reaction types (MT=600+ proton emission). Each test surfaces feature gaps to port piecewise. Files: src/orchestration/modules/acer.jl, src/formats/ace_*.jl.
acceptance_criteria: Each sibling tape34 reaches NUMERIC_PASS @1e-5 or better.

title: leapr Phase B: phonon-loop FP-order alignment (residual lines)
description: After naint gating, residual diffs from IEEE-754 order in _convol! / xa[j]+=log(al*f0/n) accumulation (leapr.f90:533). Diagnose via write(*,...) in Fortran contin at one (j,k). Files: src/processing/leapr.jl.

title: Grind remaining DIFFS per-tape (Grind Method, after fresh sweep)
description: Per-tape bisection via the Grind Method on remaining DIFFS once the post-Phase-76 sweep baseline exists. Each tape: diff cols 1-66, classify, read Fortran, fix.
acceptance_criteria: Each targeted DIFFS tape -> NUMERIC_PASS or better.

title: purr: probability-table value fidelity (T28,T35-42,T63,T72)
description: MT=152/153 structurally wired (Phase 38) but T38 STRUCTURAL_FAIL 3642 vs ref 3480. Real MC ladder value-fidelity work. Files: src/processing/purr.jl, purr_writer.jl.
acceptance_criteria: At least one purr test reaches NUMERIC_PASS @1e-5.

title: reconr: T49 MLBW +/-1 at E=110487.7 eV (MT=1, MT=2)
description: T49 RECONR 44/46 PERFECT; MT=1/MT=2 differ +/-1 last sigfig at single E=110487.7 eV. Same class as T34 Frobenius-Schur fix (always a real bug). gdb-trace Fortran csmlbw intermediates. Files: src/resonances/mlbw.jl; Fortran reconr.f90 csmlbw ~2988-3023.
acceptance_criteria: T49 reports 46/46 PERFECT, no +/-1 at E=110487.7 eV.

title: errorr: cross-ign flux-weighted collapse (colaps)
description: Fortran colaps (errorr.f90:9255-9283) flux-weighted sum over fine groups into coarse. Not blocking current tests (T15/16/17 same ign). Build _errorr_colaps when a coarser-output test needs it. Files: src/orchestration/modules/errorr.jl.
acceptance_criteria: A coarser-output-grid test produces flux-weighted sigma matching reference.

title: ACER: iopt=7 aplots viewr plot-tape (real, not stub)
description: Replace empty iopt=7 plot-tape stub with real aplots port. Unblocks viewr testing only -- low priority.
acceptance_criteria: iopt=7 produces a viewr-renderable plot tape.

title: errorr: T65 MF34 performance (re-measure first)
description: T65 errorr MF=34 angular-dist cov slow on sweep watchlist; may be subsumed by Phase 44 fix. Re-measure before optimizing. Files: src/orchestration/modules/errorr.jl MF=34 path.
acceptance_criteria: T65 completes under sweep default timeout with real output.

title: plotr: real plot-tape output (currently stub, T06)
description: plotr is a Phase 11 dispatch stub. Pure plot-tape, no downstream chain. Lowest priority. Files: src/orchestration/modules/plotr.jl.
acceptance_criteria: plotr produces a real plot tape for T06.

title: groupr: T04 tape25 nubar ULP (already passes 1e-7)
description: MF3/MT452 nubar 1-unit-in-7th-digit at LANL group 10 FP boundary; tape25 passes @1e-7 already. _groupr_nubar_records panel order. Demoted. HANDOFF P3.
acceptance_criteria: T04 tape25 119/119 at no-tolerance (needs gdb panel-order match).
